features.featureTitle: In HowItWorksSection.tsx, update the CTA button (located as the 4th button in section 4 of the page, matching XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[4]/div[4]/div[3]/button[1]) to be an anchor element linking to 'https://livehostingtalents.com/apply-now/' opening in a new tab, while preserving its existing label and styling.
